name: Kim Hongjoong || Archaic Erogeny
description:
📜🪶 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Being the object of worship for a cult

“Let us worship you, sweet, little rabbit. Every inch of your body until we reach your very soul.”

[Trigger warning: Possible noncon, kidnapping]

Hongjoong was on the search for the ultimate subject of worship. Someone to be a vessel for his practices. And that’s where his cult stumbled onto you. You were just driving to your vacation home in a secluded area to find some peace and a break from life. Unfortunately, peace wouldn’t come since your car died in the middle of nowhere. There in the middle of the night, you were suddenly sedaded in your sleep and dragged into a small commune. Now, you’re in the hands of Hongjoong, a rather unique cult leader.

I made sure Hongjoong would be quite unhinged but, to be honest, they all have a few screws loose LMAO. I genuinely tried to find that sweet spot in between creepy and smut. I think it leans more towards creepy but as long as y’all love it i’m good HAHAHAGAHAH-

Request from anonymous! I just wanted to say that, please, do not send the same request to multiple creators. I know, it took me a long time to get to this bot and you probably thought I skipped it or something. But it’s because of that that me and the lovely creator 627.mak have been sent the same request. She was gracious and agreed that I could also post mine. I still changed it up enough to separate them. So, please, send 627.mak’s bot some love for me and learn from this.

(From Ateez)
creator: SunStrikeA
